umm.digiquilt.xmlsaveload
Class SaveXML

java.lang.Object
  umm.digiquilt.xmlsaveload.SaveXML

public class SaveXML
extends Object

Version:
$Revision: 1.6 $
Author:

Constructor Summary
protected SaveXML()
          A private constructor which just creates the initial save file.
  SaveXML(Block currentBlock, Grid currentGrid, UndoRedoStack undoRedo, String studentName, String blockName, long timestamp, String notes, Challenge challenge)
          Convert the given parameters into a DigiQuilt save file.
 
Method Summary

          Save the Document object to an OutputStream.

Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

SaveXML

protected SaveXML()
           throws ParserConfigurationException
A private constructor which just creates the initial save file. This shouldn't be used by anything outside of here because it makes an empty save. The public constructors can use this to get started before adding the actual data to XML.

Throws:
ParserConfigurationException

SaveXML

public SaveXML(Block currentBlock,
               Grid currentGrid,
               UndoRedoStack undoRedo,
               String studentName,
               String blockName,
               long timestamp,
               String notes,
               Challenge challenge)
        throws ParserConfigurationException
Convert the given parameters into a DigiQuilt save file. Once created, the resulting Document can be streamed into a file or any other OutputStream. This constructor is meant for a full save.

Parameters:
currentBlock - The current block.
currentGrid - The current grid.
undoRedo - The current undo/redo stack
studentName - The name of the student
blockName - The name of the block
timestamp - The timestamp (probably just current time)
notes - The notes to be saved in this file.
challenge - The currently selected challenge.
Throws:
ParserConfigurationException
Method Detail

writeOutDocumentToFile

public void writeOutDocumentToFile(File filename)
                            throws IOException
Save the Document object to a file.

Parameters:
filename -
Throws:
IOException

writeDocumentToStream

public void writeDocumentToStream(OutputStream outStream)
                           throws IOException
Save the Document object to an OutputStream.

Parameters:
outStream -
Throws:
IOException
